interface.shortDescription: Signal-beacon memory for coding agents вЂ” directional signals, not encyclopedic answers.
interface.longDescription: MemFuse provides persistent memory across coding sessions using a signal-beacon (дїЎеЏ·зЃЇеЎ”) philosophy. It tells agents WHERE relevant information lives and WHAT kind it is, not precise encyclopedic answers. LLM-assisted extraction with deterministic fallback ensures the system never blocks.
